title: Mission morning report (report.json)
description: Machine-readable twin of REPORT.md (§12), written to .mission/<run-id>/report.json at DELIVER. Standardizes the shape so /mission-log-audit and the mailbox verdict-router can parse needs_you items without per-run guessing (the first two v0.3 runs disagreed on field names — this schema is the referee). Validate with scripts/validate_record.py.

plain_summary.description: §12 plain layer: what happened and what needs the Human, in sentences free of V/R/M vocabulary. This (rendered from REPORT.md's lead) is what the email opens with; the evidence ledger follows below.

decision_ledger.description: §12 calibration legibility: the contested/boundary role decisions, one line each — role, what was decided, against what, because. Routine decisions are NOT listed here; they compress into decisions_suppressed so omission stays auditable. Every 5th mission ships unfiltered (filtered:false on every entry is fine then).

decision.description: What was decided (e.g. 'assigned V2', 'rejected revision 1', 'accepted major with reason', 'floored tier up to Sonnet').

against.description: The object of the decision — node id, criterion, artifact.

because.description: One line of rationale, captured at decision time — the thing the Human calibrates against.

contested.description: True when another choice was live (boundary classification, override, escape).

decisions_suppressed.description: Counts for decisions the ledger filter dropped — visible so the filter itself is auditable.

breakdown.description: e.g. '9 uncontested critic passes, 2 routine V1 classifications'.

needs_you.description: The one-tap verdicts. Field name is `ask` (not `item`); ids are short stable strings so email replies can cite them.

evidence_class.description: machine | model | human — what kind of evidence backs the ask.

accepted_with_reason.description: Majors accepted with reason (§3.3 ledger), one line each.

defect_ledger.description: Known shortfalls in the delivered artifact (§5).

audit.description: AUDIT-phase summary. Lenient — narrative varies by mission class.

budget.description: §6 dual ceiling vs actual. An overrun here MUST also be a cap_hit in the fieldnotes run-record.

done.description: Per-AC evidence-class summary, AC id -> one-line evidence string.
